title: Pokemon Fossil Exhibit promo sells for hundreds despite being reprint of card worth less than $1
description: A Chicago Field Museum Archeops promo card is reselling for hundreds on eBay despite being a stamped reprint of a Pokemon TCG card worth less than $1.

title: Scientists link Central Asia’s mountain formation to ancient Tethys Ocean
description: Scientists from the University of Adelaide say tectonic processes linked to the ancient Tethys Ocean may have played a key role in shaping Central Asia’s mountainous landscape during the Cretaceous period, long before the Himalayan collision.

title: Did Life Exist Here First? Ancient Life Clues Found Beneath Asteroid Crater, Study Reveals
description: Scientists uncover possible ancient microbial evidence buried beneath an asteroid impact crater, suggesting these sites may have supported early life on Earth and reshaped origin-of-life theories. The post Did Life Exist Here First? Ancient Life Clues Found Beneath Asteroid Crater, Study Reveals appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: Advocates Slam Trump, Fossil Fuel Companies' Attacks on Women and Reproductive Rights
description: A statement made by menstrual activist Hennessy García highlights the interconnection between reproductive rights and environmental justice. Both can be threatened by the same actions, whether intentional or not.

title: Did Milky Way secretly swallow another galaxy? Ancient stars hint at lost star system
description: The discovery of these ancient metal-poor stars near the galactic disk suggests that the Milky Way may have swallowed a large galaxy early in its history, leaving behind hidden traces inside our galaxy today.
